# Project Setup Instructions

This is a simple web app project with a home page.

## Project Structure
- `index.html` - Main home page
- `styles/style.css` - Styling
- `scripts/script.js` - JavaScript functionality
- `README.md` - Project documentation

## Running the Project
Open `index.html` in a web browser or use a local development server.

## Setup Steps Completed
- [x] Project structure created
- [x] HTML, CSS, and JS files initialized
- [x] README.md created
